ab: tu pillangaw mi kana sinsi muka kana nanauwan dra garamgaman a uninan. kadru mi i salikidr muturik tremima dra ritus.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: musapak mi i sabak kana nanauwan dra garamgaman i, “i nganguwayn i, a ayaayam. i likudran i, a unaunan. muymu na muka menauwa.” kema na sinsi.
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說：「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: minedang ku dra unan. driyama, adri ku muka menauwa dra unaunan.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: menau ku dra sadru dra ayaayam. balriibiiyan kana kawi i isatr. menau ku driya dra lleu. allupe dratu buwang kana kawi.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: kana nanauwan dra garamgaman i, ullaya a zo, a ba aw a lilullaw. adri ku driya menau kanadri na garamgaman. menau ku lla garem i, panaan ku dra semangal i!
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心耶！
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: sadru ku siniyasingan. a pananau kan namalli kay nanalli.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: an masall i, kuwarenang ku driya kan namalli kay nanalli druwa.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
